title: Isaac Asimov: The Last Question (1956)
content: Isaac Asimov's short story *The Last Question* explores humanity's quest to reverse entropy and sustain life forever, posing a recurring question to an increasingly powerful computer. Through multiple epochs, the Answer from the machine reveals that no matter how advanced, entropy remains inevitable, and the ultimate solution involves redefining the universe itself. The tale examines technological progress, humanity’s hubris, and the limits of scientific knowledge.

title: 油菜花不是黄色的吗？这些彩色油菜花是怎么来的？ | 原文
content: The article explains that while rapeseed (canola) flowers are typically yellow, some flower fields display white, pink, orange, and even deep purple blossoms. The color variation is caused by the relative amounts of two pigments: carotenoids, which give yellow or orange hues, and anthocyanins, which produce red, purple, and blue tones. When the balance between these pigments shifts, the flowers appear in a spectrum of colors.

title: 在 Vim 中优雅使用 Git：一种高效工作流
content: Use LeaderF’s `:Leaderf git status` inside Vim to manage Git without leaving the editor. A split view shows a navigation panel with staged, unstaged, and untracked files, and a diff panel for code changes. File‑level shortcuts like `s`, `d`, `D`, `r` stage, discard, or refresh files; diff‑level shortcuts (`s`, `S`, `d`, `D`, `]c`, `[c`) stage, discard, or move between hunks. Commit via `c`. This workflow visualizes status, supports selective hunk staging, fast discarding, and seamless commits—all within Vim.

The platforms failed to properly verify food‑operator licenses, continued unsafe food‑delivery agreements, and neglected food‑safety duties. Additionally, their legal representatives and food‑safety directors were fined 19.69 million yuan. The platforms removed all unverified “ghost” shops and ended such partnerships.

title: 世界模型五大门派，围攻光明顶
content: The article explains how AI companies are pursuing “world models” to move beyond large language models’ limits. It outlines five main approaches: (1) JEPA, which predicts abstract latent dynamics; (2) spatial reconstruction, exemplified by World Labs’ explicit 3‑D scene generation; (3) simulation‑based learning via DeepMind’s Genie and Dreamer, creating realistic virtual environments; (4) Nvidia’s Cosmos platform, providing data processing and training tools; and (5) active inference from neuroscience, offering object‑centric, probabilistic reasoning. The piece argues these methods complement each other and may eventually merge to achieve true AI that interacts with the physical world.

title: 牛逼了，我的阿里云百炼 Coding Plan Pro 莫名被永久封禁，联系客服，无法解封。寻求替代。
content: I upgraded my Alibaba Cloud Bailian Coding Plan Pro, but it was suddenly permanently banned. After contacting support, I learned the system automatically revoked the subscription without providing a reason. Likely the ban stemmed from using the plan on multiple machines (hosting several laptops and a local dev setup), which may count as account sharing or violating the “no API calls” clause. The service terms forbid non‑interactive batch calls and account sharing, and credits are non‑refundable. I’m looking for alternative coding plans.

title: 北大医学博士：80%猝死的人，平时看起来都很正常
content: Heart disease is the leading cause of death in China, with sudden cardiac death (SCD) accounting for over 80 % of cases. Most SCD victims appear healthy; only a small fraction of known heart‑disease patients die suddenly. Risk is driven by hypertension, hyperlipidaemia, diabetes, sedentary lifestyle, poor diet, smoking, obesity, stress, and anger. While routine exams cannot detect plaque, controlling these “high‑risk” factors and early recognition of chest pain or shortness of breath can reduce SCD risk.

title: Claude Opus 4.7连夜突袭：或将抢走全球7亿打工人饭碗
content: Anthropic released Claude Opus 4.7, its strongest public model yet, focusing on complex task execution, improved visual understanding, and stable long‑term workflows. It outperforms Opus 4.6 on coding, graph reasoning, and screen‑based tasks, with visual accuracy rising close to perfect. Users now see better instruction following, finer image analysis (up to 2576 px), and outputs that require less editing. Token usage increases modestly, and the model includes safety guardrails, but pricing remains unchanged.

title: 刚刚，Claude Opus 4.7突然发布：不是最强，但奥特曼又得失眠
content: Anthropic’s new Claude Opus 4.7, released this week, is not the firm’s strongest model but delivers significant gains in reliability. Benchmarks show it surpasses GPT‑5.4 and Gemini on software engineering, visual reasoning, and tool use, and it handles errors better by refusing unsafe instructions and self‑resolving failures. While its advanced token budget and “xhigh” mode increase cost, the model’s dependable, critical‑thinking behavior makes it a useful, high‑performance assistant for complex tasks.

title: 终于, 降智几天之后, opus4.7 出来了
content: Claude Opus 4.7 improves programming performance (SWE‑bench 87.6% vs 80.8% in 4.6), visual input resolution (long side up to ~2576 px vs ~1568 px), and agent/tool‑calling efficiency (≈14% better on complex workflows, fewer errors, better multi‑turn context). It enforces more literal instruction following and increases token use (1.0‑1.35× tokenizer, higher output tokens). Some benchmarks (Terminal‑Bench 2.0, BrowseComp) regress. New features include xhigh reasoning, updated knowledge cutoff (Jan 2026), and built‑in safety checks. Cost per token remains unchanged.

title: Anthropic 发布 Claude Opus 4.7，强化复杂工程与视觉能力
content: Anthropic has released Claude Opus 4.7, an upgraded AI model that significantly improves high‑level programming performance compared to Opus 4.6. It handles complex, time‑consuming software tasks more accurately, interprets instructions precisely, and generates its own verification checks before output. The model also offers markedly stronger visual capabilities, enabling higher‑resolution image recognition. Users will find it more aesthetic and creative, producing higher‑quality interfaces, slides, and documents in professional contexts.

title: 黄仁勋呼吁中美加强 AI 合作，出口管制难遏中国算力
content: NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang said the recent breakthrough of Anthropic’s Mythos security model shows that the United States should cooperate with China on AI research to agree on safe usage. He argues that dialogue and research collaboration are the safest approach, noting that current trade and security tensions hinder essential partnerships. Over the past year, Huang has pressured the Trump administration to ease export controls, arguing that China’s abundant energy, mature chip manufacturing, and strong processing capability keep its computing power from being constrained.

title: 具身智能赛道迎来年度最大单笔融资，它石智航获 4.55 亿美金 Pre-A 轮融资
content: The embodied‑intelligence company Tishizhihang raised $455 million in a Pre‑A round led by Hillhouse Capital and Sequoia China. This marks the largest single funding in the field since 2026. Funds will build a general embodied AI model, AWE, and attract talent; subsequent capital will focus on mass‑producing robots. Founded in 2024 by Chen Yilun and Li Zhenyu, the firm has developed its own SenseHub wearable data system and announced AWE 3.0 technology, earning a Guinness record for industrial precision work.

title: 赴美游客大幅减少，中国有望成全球最大旅游经济体
content: China’s tourism grew 9.9% last year, more than twice the global average and far outpacing the United States’ 0.9% rise. The increase was driven by over 10% growth in foreign‑visitor spending in China, while U.S. visitor spending fell nearly 5%. If both countries maintain similar rates, China could become the world’s largest tourism economy by the end of this decade.

title: 阿里发布世界模型 HappyOyster，与谷歌 Genie3 竞争
content: Alibaba introduced the real‑time world‑model product HappyOyster on April 16. Developed by the Alibaba ATH Innovation Department, it uses a native multimodal architecture for unified audio‑video generation and understanding. The system offers two key capabilities—roaming and directing—allowing users to construct AI‑generated digital worlds instantly. HappyOyster is positioned in the emerging world‑simulation arena, comparable to Google’s Genie3.

title: 曝网盘海外影视资源迎来史上最严清查
content: Starting April 10, a strict crackdown on overseas film and TV content on cloud storage services began, with Quark Disk combing through user‑stored media. Many public sharing links were disabled, prompting popular content reposters to urge downloads or transfers, and some overseas drama creators paused uploads or removed their libraries. In May 2025, four ministries launched the “Swords 2025” initiative, targeting six areas—audio‑visual works, animation and games, software, network storage and distribution, online sales, and streaming devices—to enforce copyright compliance.

title: 为什么长兄长姐更聪明
content: Eldest siblings tend to be more intelligent because they usually receive more responsibility early in life, encouraging greater cognitive development and problem‑solving skills. They often serve as role models for younger brothers and sisters, which motivates parents to invest extra educational resources in them. This heightened attention, combined with the challenges of managing younger siblings, helps elders develop advanced reasoning abilities and academic performance.

title: 让 ai 重写了整个 git 的历史，强迫症被拯救了
content: I used AI to identify and rewrite vague commit messages in my solo Git project. The tool analyzed diffs, generated clearer descriptions, and I created a Bash script to apply these new messages via `git filter-branch`, backing up the branch first. The script lists changes, allows dry‑run or auto‑confirm, and updates the history. After running it, the log looks tidy and informative.

title: 推理机器时代的人类数学——菲尔兹奖得主阿克沙伊・文卡特什（Akshay Venkatesh）(1) | 原文
content: Akshay Venkatesh, a 2022 Fields Medal winner, reflects on how the rise of artificial intelligence is reshaping the practice and language of mathematics. He argues that mathematical concepts may undergo significant reconstruction driven by automation, drawing on historical examples to illustrate this trend. The article combines contemporary philosophical analysis with a review of current mathematical work, suggesting a profound redefinition of human mathematical activity in the era of reasoning machines.

title: 推理机器时代的人类数学——菲尔兹奖得主阿克沙伊・文卡特什（Akshay Venkatesh）(2) | 原文
content: The article discusses the limitations of “mental objects” in explaining external thinking, such as writing and calculation. It notes problems with reproducibility, unexpected links between mental objects, and strong cultural influences on reproducible mental structures—illustrated by the effort needed for the brain to learn alphabets and digits. The Davis–Hirsh argument is highlighted for its two key features: treating mathematics as both a human mental activity and a socially reproducible phenomenon, providing a useful framework for understanding mathematics’ role in culture.

title: Speed at Scale: Optimizing the Largest CX Platform Out There
How GitHub uses eBPF to improve deployment safety
content: GitHub uses eBPF to prevent circular dependencies during deployments. By placing deployment scripts in dedicated cgroups and attaching eBPF programs that filter outbound traffic—both at IP and DNS levels—it blocks calls to GitHub when unavailable and logs which process triggered each blocked request. The system captures DNS transaction IDs, maps them to PIDs, and reports blocked domains with command details. This approach improves deployment safety, reduces incident recovery time, and is already live in production.
